operation.add:
<style>
.scf-hw{background:#fff8e1;border:1px solid #f1c40f;padding:10px 14px;margin:0 0 14px;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;}
.scf-hw summary{cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;color:#7a6500;outline:none;}
.scf-hw table{width:100%;margin-top:8px;border-collapse:collapse;table-layout:fixed;background:#fff;}
.scf-hw thead th{background:#fef5d2;font-weight:600;color:#5a4d12;text-align:left;padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e9d785;font-size:12px;}
.scf-hw tbody td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #f1eccd;vertical-align:middle;word-break:break-all;}
.scf-hw tbody tr:hover{background:#fffbea;}
.scf-hw .scf-col-lang{width:70px;}
.scf-hw .scf-col-old,.scf-hw .scf-col-new{width:auto;}
.scf-hw .scf-col-arrow{width:24px;text-align:center;color:#999;}
.scf-hw .scf-col-date{width:140px;color:#888;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;}
.scf-hw .scf-col-action{width:90px;text-align:right;}
.scf-hw code{background:transparent;color:#3a4a5e;font-family:Consolas,monospace;font-size:12px;}
.scf-hw .scf-cur td{background:#f8fff0;}
.scf-hw .scf-cur strong{color:#2f7a5b;}
.scf-hw .scf-fill-btn{padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #d4c89e;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;color:#7a6500;}
.scf-hw .scf-fill-btn:hover{background:#fef5d2;border-color:#b8a854;}
.scf-flash{animation:scfFlash 1.2s ease-out;}
@keyframes scfFlash{0%{background:#ffe66d}100%{background:transparent}}
</style>
<script>
(function () {
  var nodes = document.querySelectorAll('[data-scf-history-widget]');
  if (!nodes.length) return;
  var url = new URL(location.href);
  var token = url.searchParams.get('user_token') || '';
  var routeBase = '/admin/index.php?route=extension/module/oc_kit_seo_core/urlHistoryWidget&user_token=' + encodeURIComponent(token);

  // Lazy-load: widget sits inside #tab-seo (display:none until user opens
  // SEO tab), so IntersectionObserver fires only when tab becomes visible.
  // No DB query / no fetch on initial page render — keeps form snappy.
  var loaded = new WeakSet();
  function scheduleLoad(host, run) {
    if (loaded.has(host)) return;
    if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
      var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
        entries.forEach(function (e) {
          if (!e.isIntersecting || loaded.has(host)) return;
          loaded.add(host); io.disconnect();
          (window.requestIdleCallback || function (cb) { setTimeout(cb, 200); })(run, { timeout: 1500 });
        });
      }, { rootMargin: '120px' });
      io.observe(host);
    } else {
      loaded.add(host);
      (window.requestIdleCallback || function (cb) { setTimeout(cb, 800); })(run, { timeout: 2500 });
    }
  }

  nodes.forEach(function (host) {
    var entityType = host.getAttribute('data-entity-type');
    var idParam    = host.getAttribute('data-id-param');
    var targetName = host.getAttribute('data-target-name') || '';
    var entityId   = url.searchParams.get(idParam);
    if (!entityId) return;

    var run = function () {
      fetch(routeBase + '&entity_type=' + encodeURIComponent(entityType) + '&entity_id=' + encodeURIComponent(entityId), {credentials:'same-origin'})
        .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
        .then(function (d) { render(host, d, targetName); })
        .catch(function () {});
    };

    scheduleLoad(host, run);
  });

  // ── DOM rendering (no innerHTML, no string escaping) ────────────────────
  function el(tag, attrs, children) {
    var node = document.createElement(tag);
    if (attrs) {
      Object.keys(attrs).forEach(function (k) {
        var v = attrs[k];
        if (v == null || v === false) return;
        if (k === 'class') node.className = v;
        else if (k === 'text') node.textContent = v;
        else if (k.indexOf('data-') === 0 || k === 'title' || k === 'colspan' || k === 'type') node.setAttribute(k, v);
        else node[k] = v;
      });
    }
    (children || []).forEach(function (c) {
      if (c == null) return;
      node.appendChild(typeof c === 'string' ? document.createTextNode(c) : c);
    });
    return node;
  }

  function render(host, d, targetName) {
    var hist = (d && d.history) || [];
    var cur  = (d && d.current) || [];
    if (!hist.length && !cur.length) return;

    var langMap = (d && d.languages) || {};
    function langLabel(id) {
      var l = langMap[id];
      return l && l.code ? (l.name || '') + ' (' + l.code + ')' : 'lang ' + id;
    }

    var tbody = el('tbody');

    cur.forEach(function (c) {
      tbody.appendChild(el('tr', { class: 'scf-cur', 'data-lang': c.language_id }, [
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-lang', text: langLabel(c.language_id) }),
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-old', colspan: 3 }, [
          el('strong', null, [ el('code', { text: c.keyword }) ]),
        ]),
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-date' }, [ el('em', { text: 'поточний' }) ]),
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-action' }),
      ]));
    });

    hist.forEach(function (h) {
      var actionCell = el('td', { class: 'scf-col-action' });
      if (targetName) {
        actionCell.appendChild(el('button', {
          type: 'button',
          class: 'scf-fill-btn',
          'data-fill': h.old_keyword,
          'data-lang': h.language_id,
          title: 'Підставити старий keyword у поле',
          text: '↩ підставити',
        }));
      }
      tbody.appendChild(el('tr', { 'data-lang': h.language_id }, [
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-lang', text: langLabel(h.language_id) }),
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-old' },  [ el('code', { text: h.old_keyword }) ]),
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-arrow', text: '→' }),
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-new' },  [ el('code', { text: h.new_keyword }) ]),
        el('td', { class: 'scf-col-date',   text: h.changed_at }),
        actionCell,
      ]));
    });

    var colgroup = el('colgroup', null, ['lang','old','arrow','new','date','action'].map(function (n) {
      return el('col', { class: 'scf-col-' + n });
    }));
    var thead = el('thead', null, [ el('tr', null, ['Мова','Старий','','Новий','Дата',''].map(function (t) {
      return el('th', { text: t });
    })) ]);
    var table = el('table', null, [colgroup, thead, tbody]);

    var details = el('details', hist.length ? null : { open: true }, [
      el('summary', { text: 'SEO URL: ' + cur.length + ' поточних, ' + hist.length + ' змін(и) в історії' }),
      table,
    ]);

    var wrap = el('div', { class: 'scf-hw' }, [details]);
    while (host.firstChild) host.removeChild(host.firstChild);
    host.appendChild(wrap);

    if (targetName) {
      host.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        var btn = e.target.closest('.scf-fill-btn');
        if (!btn) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        var fill = btn.getAttribute('data-fill') || '';
        var lang = btn.getAttribute('data-lang') || '';
        // Match all inputs `<targetName>[<store>][<lang>]` for this language across stores
        var sel = 'input[name^="' + targetName + '["][name$="][' + lang + ']"]';
        document.querySelectorAll(sel).forEach(function (inp) {
          inp.value = fill;
          inp.classList.add('scf-flash');
          setTimeout(function () { inp.classList.remove('scf-flash'); }, 1200);
          inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        });
      });
    }
  }
})();
</script>
